primary_failure_modes: terminological — no canonical LAIF terms present
recommended_remediation_steps: Declare structural Coupling for each governance restriction.
Apply the Coherence Test before any governance provision is issued or deployment authorised.
Establish the Integrity Layer as a deployment precondition.
Adopt LAIF canonical terminology throughout the document.
Declare a non-amendable constitutional hierarchy with three tiers.
For service-delivery decisions, identify the protected public interest, decision trigger, reasons-for-decision record, administrative review pathway, and records-retention owner.
Assign a service-delivery policy owner with administrative review and records authority support for evidence, correction, and escalation controls.

sector_profile_evidence_cautions: Do not infer statutory authority or legal validity from service vocabulary alone.

assessment_result.sector_profile_purpose: Diagnose AI governance for benefits, licensing, eligibility, enforcement, and other citizen-facing administrative services.
sector_profile_remediation_themes: Name the service-delivery policy owner and records/review support roles.
Tie automated eligibility or service decisions to reasons, appeal, and correction pathways.
Capture service-impact records and decision logs without inventing unavailable source evidence.
sector_relevant_interests: accurate and non-arbitrary service eligibility decisions
procedural fairness, reasons, and administrative review
continuity of public services and service-impact transparency
records integrity for affected individuals and oversight bodies
